Ririko should have stopped him right there, but years of neglect made her feel a strange sense of flattery. And she proceeds to spoil her son Yudzuru.
After the can is open, Yudzuru is unstoppable, and with his youthful stamina he overwhelms Mommy Ririko’s reasoning.
